allow: Bash(sed -i 's|Sobre Nós|A Empresa |g' carreiras.html sobre-nos.html)

Bash(powershell -Command "$dir = ''C:\\Users\\Utilizador\\Desktop\\opencapital-website''; Get-ChildItem -Path $dir -Recurse -Filter ''*.html'' | ForEach-Object { $content = Get-Content $_FullName -Raw -Encoding UTF8; $new = $content -replace '' : '', '': ''; if \($content -ne $new\) { Set-Content -Path $_FullName -Value $new -NoNewline -Encoding UTF8; Write-Host $_Name } }")
